summary: Verified all 8 bug fixes from EMERGENT_BUGFIXES_R1.md are properly implemented. Frontend loads correctly, UI components render without crashes, error handling for external n8n API works correctly. Bug fixes verified through comprehensive code review since external API returns empty responses preventing full E2E testing.

minor.issue: External n8n webhook API returns HTTP 200 with empty body - not under our control

integration_issues.issue: Cannot functionally test V3 bug fix components in action - external n8n webhook returns empty responses. All components verified via code review.

BUG_1_P0_budget_setup.fix: Uses protein_target (already supplement-deducted) from backend. Distribution values displayed directly from backend's values field without recalculation.
code_evidence: Line 732: const proteinTarget = data?.protein_target || 150
Lines 756-770: getDistributionValues() uses backend values directly
Line 782: Shows protein deduction math (original - supplements = target)

BUG_2_P0_product_select.fix: Groups products by source using products_by_source map, shows up to 4 products per source section.
code_evidence: Line 1070: const productsBySourceMap = data?.products_by_source || {}
Lines 1082-1152: Builds product groups using products_by_source keys
Lines 1155-1267: renderCategorySection shows ALL products for each source (up to 4)

BUG_3_P0_edit_buttons.fix: MealBadge has Edit button sending {edit_meal: 'meal_name'}. Consolidation has Edit buttons per meal + Modify dropdown menu.
code_evidence: Line 1544: onClick={() => onEdit({ edit_meal: mealLabel.toLowerCase() })
Lines 1657-1666: Consolidation Edit button per meal
Lines 1717-1725: Consolidation Modify dropdown with Edit options

BUG_4_P1_portion_confirm.fix: Always shows utilization options if present, including for dinner. No longer filters by meal type.
code_evidence: Line 1297-1306: utilizationOptions extracted without meal filtering
Line 1311-1316: allUtilizationSelected checks ALL options
Line 1425-1427: Renders utilization section for ANY meal with options

BUG_5_P1_change_products.fix: Added 'Change Products' button at top that sends {edit_meal: 'meal_name'} via onChangeProducts prop.
code_evidence: Line 1278: Component accepts onChangeProducts prop
Lines 1332-1337: handleChangeProducts sends edit_meal
Lines 1343-1357: Button rendered at top with '← Change Products' label
Line 2454: PortionConfirmCard receives onChangeProducts={send}

BUG_6_P1_weekly_summary.fix: Fixed day dropdown to render meals[].products[] nested structure properly with accordion.
code_evidence: Lines 1801-1863: Accordion for each day with nested meals
Lines 1826-1858: Each meal renders its products array
Lines 1840-1855: Products rendered with name, quantity, protein
Lines 1865-1872: Fallback to weekly_text if structured data unavailable

BUG_7_P2_cart_editor.fix: CartEditor overlay shows alternative products from stored productsCatalog, filtered by category.
code_evidence: Line 1942: CartEditor component defined
Lines 1950-1961: alternativeProducts filtered by category
Lines 2337-2341: MealPlanningWizard stores productsCatalog state
Lines 2493-2500: CartEditor rendered when cartEditorOpen=true
Line 1898-1904: Change button in WeeklySummary cart opens CartEditor

BUG_8_P2_collapsed_badge.fix: Counts actual selected products from user's JSON submission instead of showing generic text.
code_evidence: Lines 663-685: For product_select, searches next messages for user's products selection
Line 669-676: Parses user JSON to find products array
Line 684-685: Shows actual product count in badge text

playwright_tests_executed: TEST 1: Homepage loads correctly - PASS (brand, CTA, features visible)
TEST 2: MacroFork screen loads - PASS (title, inputs, buttons, info tip)
TEST 3: Form validation works - PASS (button enables after form fill)
TEST 4: Form submission - PASS (error handling when API returns empty)
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 bug fixes are properly implemented with clear comments
Defensive Array.isArray() guards present for all .map() calls
BUG 1: DistributionSetup correctly uses protein_target from backend
BUG 2: ProductCardGrid properly groups by products_by_source with up to 4 per source
BUG 3: Both MealBadge and Consolidation send {edit_meal: 'meal_name'} correctly
BUG 4: PortionConfirmCard shows utilization options for ALL meals including dinner
BUG 5: 'Change Products' button properly implemented with onChangeProducts prop
BUG 6: WeeklySummary renders nested meals[].products[] structure correctly
BUG 7: CartEditor overlay implemented with category-filtered alternatives
BUG 8: CollapsedBadge parses user's JSON submission for actual product count

success_rate.backend: N/A - External n8n API dependency (not under our control)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All screens load correctly, bug fixes verified via code review

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 bug fixes from EMERGENT_BUGFIXES_R1.md verified through code review. External n8n webhook API (karanbabbar.app.n8n.cloud) returns empty responses. To fully functional test bug fix components in action, either mock the API or wait for n8n webhook to be operational. The app handles API errors gracefully.

rca_of_issue.external_api_limitation: The n8n webhook API at https://karanbabbar.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/v2/meal-planning returns HTTP 200 with empty body. This prevents functional E2E testing of V3 components but all bug fixes are verified through comprehensive code review.
